metadata.title:
|. v v. MAN GOES ON


ROCK PILE FOR GRUB

pages.raw_text:
"Scab, skunk, cur. traitor!" Thus
shouted $50 members and sympa-
thizers Of the |. w. W., confined
in the city Jail this morning, when
Lewis Scanned, one of their mum.
Der, weakened on the diet of bread
and water but twice daily, and left
the Jail to work out his fine on
the rock pile.


1t is against the principles of
the l. w. w. to put up bonds, pay
fines or to work out fines for the
city. Stubborn members of the
order declare they would prefer
death to any one of the three al
ternatives, so Scanned is a traitor
to their order, according to that.


They bounced on the weak, half
starved fellow, and kicked at him
as they Kissed denunciation from
between the bars, but Scanned
was hungry and he .bartered the
respect of his fellow workers and
